content: Mobile sports companion apps (FotMob, Onefootball, 365Scores, LiveScore, bet365, FanDuel) share table stakes: live score+clock, possession/match stats, deep stats panels, push notifications, multi-tournament coverage, lineups, player ratings. None ship AR camera overlay, AI risk detection, or on-chain hedge execution. The AR/HUD mobile football companion space is open. Differentiation for hackathon must lean into AR canvas + AI risk engine + Solana Blinks, NOT feature parity with established apps.
